entries.question: cadence tick は何を判断したか
entries.answer: Cadence surfaces are fresh enough; no self-start is required right now.
entries.expectation_state: cadence tick can now evaluate cadence state even when follow-through still needs more explicit input
entries.scale_direction: reduce remaining operator input needs for cadence follow-through

entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: cadence still depends on an external caller or scheduler to invoke cadence-cycle at all
entries.expectation_state: cadence cycle can now self-start cadence processing when timing says due-now and defer when timing says not-due
entries.mismatch_state: cadence still depends on an external caller or scheduler to invoke cadence-cycle at all
entries.scale_direction: keep TASK-004 focused on external scheduling vs deeper self-start automation

entries.question: cadence cycle は何を実行したか
entries.answer: Cadence surfaces are fresh enough; no self-start is required right now.
entries.expectation_state: cadence cycle can now defer cadence work when the runtime says it is not due
entries.scale_direction: keep checking timing until cadence becomes due-now
